title: Slovakian Chicken Bowl
description: A hearty and flavorful dish inspired by Slovakian cuisine, served in a bowl with chicken, vegetables, and a hint of garlic.

ingredients.name: garlicky chicken breast
ingredients.notes: marinated with a mix of garlic and herbs

instructions: Season the chicken breast with caraway seeds and black pepper.
Heat olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken breast for 2-3 minutes on each side, then transfer to the oven.
Roast the chicken breast in the oven for 12-15 minutes, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, sauté the sliced mushrooms in a separate skillet over medium heat.
Add the shredded cabbage to the skillet with the mushrooms and cook until wilted.
Serve the cooked chicken breast on top of the mushroom and cabbage mixture in a bowl.
